title: The Stranger from Ponca City
actors: Charles Starrett, Virginia Hunter, Texas Jim Lewis
plot: A saddle-weary Steve Larkin (Charles Starrett), also the Duranko Kid, rides into Red Mound, a town filled with cattle rustlers. Cafe owner Smiley (Smiley Burnette), befriends Steve and fills him in on the activities. Steve angers ...
